note: Subscribe-and-save 'running low' nudge for diapers — a supply-low signal. The supplier directly asks the family to act ('Want us to ship your next box early?') against a subscription on file, so it routes to autonomous_action/place_supply_order (a reorder), not a passive FYI.

input.rawContent:
From: subscriptions@everydaybaby.ca
Subject: You're running low on diapers

Based on your delivery history, you'll likely run out of Size 2 diapers in about 5 days. Want us to ship your next box early? You have a subscription on file.
